caption: The video begins with a static shot of the Direxion logo, prominently displayed against a black background. The logo features the word "Direxion" in a bold, blue font, with the letter "x" stylized to include a curved line. Below the main text, the words "ETFs | Funds" are written in a smaller, white font, indicating the company's focus on exchange-traded funds and financial products. At the bottom of the screen, the website address "www.direxion.com" is also displayed in white, providing viewers with a direct link for more information. The scene remains unchanged throughout the sequence, maintaining a professional and straightforward presentation of the company's branding and online presence.
